description: An Earth Science curriculum developer needs a looping animation showing the 12-month annual cycle of global precipitation to illustrate the Intertropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ) migration. Using the design brief at ~/Desktop/exhibit_design_brief.txt and the precipitation climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/, create a 12-month animation and a lesson plan documenting the ITCZ's seasonal extremes. Export the animation to /home/ga/Documents/itcz_animation.mp4 and save the lesson plan to /home/ga/Documents/itcz_lesson_plan.txt.
